business.name: M&M Outdoor Solutions
business.tagline: Transforming Macon yards one project at a time

hero.headline: Macon Yards That *Make the Neighbors* Notice
hero.subheadline: From overgrown disasters to picture-perfect landscapes — we handle the heavy lifting while you enjoy the results.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Square Foot Covered
services_section.subheading: Complete outdoor solutions from design to maintenance

services.title: Landscape Design & Installation
services.description: Custom designs that work with Georgia's climate and your budget. We plant what thrives, not what dies in our heat.

services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.description: Weekly cuts, seasonal cleanups, and the kind of attention that keeps grass green through summer scorchers.

services.title: Hardscaping & Patios
services.description: Stone patios, walkways, and retaining walls built to last. No shortcuts, no settling, no callbacks.

services.title: Tree & Shrub Services
services.description: Pruning, removal, and planting. We know which trees belong in Middle Georgia and which ones don't.

about.heading: Rooted in Macon
about.body: M&M Outdoor Solutions brings professional landscaping to Middle Georgia properties. We understand local soil conditions, seasonal challenges, and what it takes to create outdoor spaces that thrive year-round. Every project gets our full attention, from initial design through final cleanup.

cta.heading: Ready for a Yard You'll Actually Want to Show Off?
cta.body: Free estimates on all landscaping projects. We'll walk your property, discuss your vision, and give you a straight answer on what it takes.
